title: Nalellam Lyrics Aadama Jaichomada Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Nalellam
Singer(s): Shakthisree Gopalan
Lyricist: GKB
Music: Sean Roldan

Nalellam seevi
naan singarichu ninirundhaen
enkolam nee kalaikka thaan.

Machaan vandhudiya
mayakkam thandhiduyaa
muththathil nee kulikka vaaa

Verum soththil suvai yedhaiyyaa
unakku venjalu maanavaarenya.
Un kannu enna moikkum
enna urasithaan ponga vaikkum.

Nalellam seevi
naan singarichu ninirundhaen
enkolam nee kalaikka thaan.

Panju pola vandhu ninna
paththikkuven naanumnaa
thoda thoda thoda theepori parakkum

vela mudnju neeyum vandhadha
verthiduven naanumnaa
mudinjaalum kadhaya thodarum
haiyyo unna nenachuthaan

potten kanakku onnu naan.
pulli vachaa kolamthaan
pootti vaippen unna naan.

Machaan vandhudiya
mayakkam thandhiduyaa
muththathil nee kulikka vaaa

Verum soththil suvai yedhaiyyaa
unakku venjalu maanavaarenya.
Un kannu enna moikkum
enna urasithaan ponga vaikkum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nalellam'?

'Nalellam' conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the happiness of being in love.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Aadama Jaichomada, the song captures a light-hearted moment that emphasizes the carefree spirit of the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shakthisree Gopalan and composed by Sean Roldan.

When was 'Nalellam' released?

'Nalellam' was released on September 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Nalellam' is a lively and cheerful song that encapsulates the joy of love and celebration. Featured in the movie Aadama Jaichomada, it showcases the carefree moments of the characters, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. With Shakthisree Gopalan's vibrant vocals and Sean Roldan's engaging composition, this track is sure to leave a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nalellam from Aadama Jaichomada is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the enchanting vocals of Shakthisree Gopalan. With Sean Roldan's captivating music and GKB's clever lyrics, this song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Dive into this melodic journey that promises to uplift your spirits and make every moment memorable!
stanzaMeanings: I have been singing with joy, and you are the one who listens to me.
I have been waiting for the temple that is hidden in the stars, and in our home, the wedding is celebrated.
Hey buddy, did you bring your charm? Come and bathe in the pearls.
Just a taste of the flavor, do you want it? I am a human being. Your eyes will make me feel something, and it will be placed in my heart.
I have been singing with joy, and you are the one who listens to me.
I have been waiting for the temple that is hidden in the stars, and in our home, the wedding is celebrated.
Like cotton, I will come to your side, and slowly, slowly, I will fly like a spark.
When the work is done, if you come, I will forget everything, but even if it ends, the story will continue, oh, I have thought of you.
I have counted one, and I will put a design with a dot. I will cover you with it.
Hey buddy, did you bring your charm? Come and bathe in the pearls.
Just a taste of the flavor, do you want it? I am a human being. Your eyes will make me feel something, and it will be placed in my heart.
